ignorePatterns.comment: App-relative image paths served by the Nuxt frontend (frontend/public/images/) — not resolvable by offline link checkers
App-relative route (frontend/app/pages/for-companies.vue) — not resolvable by offline link checkers
Docs screenshot images served from the production LFX Crowdfunding site — not yet available in CI (site not yet deployed to production)
Requires Auth0 SSO login — unreachable by an unauthenticated link checker
